content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer

-- when folder is specified (delta) the code looks for delta_log file, where transactions are stored
-- ids necessary to have delta_log file to been able to read the files

SELECT TOP 100 * 
FROM 
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'vehicle_registration_delta/' ,
    DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
    FORMAT = 'DELTA'
) AS Vehicle_registration;

-- this data includes year and month columns
EXEC sp_describe_first_result_set N'
SELECT TOP 100 * 
FROM 
OPENROWSET(
    BULK ''vehicle_registration_delta/'' ,
    DATA_SOURCE = ''electric_vehicle_data_bronze'',
    FORMAT = ''DELTA''
) AS Vehicle_registration;'



SELECT TOP 100 * 
FROM 
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'vehicle_registration_delta/' ,
    DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
    FORMAT = 'DELTA'
) WITH(
    --vehicleId           INT,
    --locationId          SMALLINT,
    propietaryId        TINYINT,
    dolVehicleId        INT,
    --registrationDate    DATETIME2(7),
    year                VARCHAR(4),
    month               VARCHAR(2)

)AS Vehicle_registration


SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT locationId)
FROM 
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'vehicle_registration_delta/' ,
    DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
    FORMAT = 'DELTA'
) AS Vehicle_registration
WHERE year = '2024' AND
    month = '01'
